body_txt: When heroes are about to go Storming the Castle , or facing impossible and deadly odds, "Try Not To Die" is a common saying in more grim works. Not, "Knock 'em dead!" or the more emotive "We're counting on you", but this simple, plaintive request... which goes a long way to saying just how bad the odds and low the expectations are of the adventurers as well as their loved ones. Compare How Dare You Die on Me! Contrast Prepare to Die . Has nothing to do with Press X to Not Die .
